note: First end-to-end keeper rescue on a live EVM (local anvil). Proves the full loop: on-chain monitor -> strategist decision + memo -> executor tx -> health restored. The Arc testnet run (same code, real explorer links) follows once the deployer key is provisioned.
scenario: 1000 mEURC collateral, 700 USDC debt; EURC drifts 1.08 -> 0.98

decision.memo: HF 1.120 < trigger 1.200. Target 1.380. Debt 700.00 USDC. Candidates: TOP-UP, ROTATE, DELEVERAGE. Chose TOP-UP 131.88 USDC from reserve (no swap, no slippage, no collateral sold) — cheapest of 3 viable (cost 0.00 USDC).
decision.reason: reserve funded; top-up incurs no swap fee or slippage, so it is the cheapest of the three viable paths
